subjects_180d: Initial commit from Create Next App
Initial commit from Create Next App

files.docSummary: Inline script tag — runs before React hydration to avoid theme flash.
files.docBlock: Inline script tag — runs before React hydration to avoid theme flash.

explainability.primaryDocBlock: Inline script tag — runs before React hydration to avoid theme flash.

files.docSummary: Goal definition, persistence, and progress evaluation. Goals are pure
Multi-instrument management — CRUD plus a notion of a "primary" instrument
Local-first persistence layer — IndexedDB schema, migrations, and raw
Piece library — CRUD on the user's repertoire plus rotation analysis
Synthetic seed data — used by the "Seed with example data" empty-state
files.docBlock:
Synthetic seed data — used by the "Seed with example data" empty-state
action. Generates ~30 days of plausible sessions across 2 instruments
and 4 pieces so newcomers see populated stats immediately.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Synthetic seed data — used by the "Seed with example data" empty-state
action. Generates ~30 days of plausible sessions across 2 instruments
and 4 pieces so newcomers see populated stats immediately.

files.docSummary: Practice session lifecycle — create, update, delete and aggregate.
Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
files.docBlock:
Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
pub/subs to react components via a tiny listener pattern. The dataset is
small (single-user, local) so keeping it in memory is fine.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Light client-side store. Loads all data from IndexedDB into memory and
pub/subs to react components via a tiny listener pattern. The dataset is
small (single-user, local) so keeping it in memory is fine.

files.docSummary: Pure analytics over session data — heatmap cells, time-of-day buckets,
Data portability — JSON export, JSON import with shape validation, and
Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
files.docBlock:
Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
IDs are short random base36 strings (no UUID dependency).
All timestamps are ISO 8601 strings unless otherwise noted.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Shared domain types used across the Tempo app.
IDs are short random base36 strings (no UUID dependency).
All timestamps are ISO 8601 strings unless otherwise noted.

files.docSummary: Date helpers used throughout the app.
files.docBlock:
Date helpers used throughout the app.
All "day keys" are ISO date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) anchored to local time
so that "today" lines up with the user's calendar, not UTC.

explainability.primaryDocBlock:
Date helpers used throughout the app.
All "day keys" are ISO date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) anchored to local time
so that "today" lines up with the user's calendar, not UTC.

files.docSummary: Generate short, sortable-ish unique IDs without an external dep.
files.docBlock:
Generate short, sortable-ish unique IDs without an external dep.
Combines a base36 timestamp prefix with random suffix.
